amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 72 — paragraph 6 a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 72 — paragraph 6 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

6 a. the European Data Protection Supervisor shall, on an annual basis, notify the AI Office of the fines it has imposed pursuant to this Article.
parliament_text: 6 a. the European Data Protection Supervisor shall, on an annual basis, notify the AI Office of the fines it has imposed pursuant to this Article.
